title: Shot Glasses, Pack of 100, 50ml Plastic Shot and Desert Glass, Strong Durable Hard Plastic, Quality Crystal Clear Shot Cups (100)
features: Crystal clear plastic shot glasses - Pack of 100 - Larger size 50ml / 3cl

Introducing the Tijar 100-Pack Reusable Plastic Shot Glasses - the perfect addition to your party or event! Made from high-quality, durable plastic, these shot glasses are designed to withstand the test of time. Say goodbye to disposable shot glasses and hello to reusable alternatives. Each glass holds 50ml of your favorite beverage, making them ideal for serving shots, mini cocktails, or even desserts.
Perfect for any occasion - the glasses are great for parties, events weddings - ideal for both indoor and outdoor - garden parties and barbecues

Versatility is key with the Tijar shot glasses. Not only are they perfect for your favorite spirits, but they can also be used for various other purposes. Serve up bite-sized appetizers, create stunning dessert displays, or use them for DIY crafts. Their versatility knows no bounds! And with the Tijar brand, you can trust that you're getting a reliable and durable product that will exceed your expectations.
Great for using with Gol Guppa

Upgrade your party essentials with the Tijar 100-Pack Reusable Plastic Shot Glasses. With their durability, stackability, and versatility, these shot glasses are an absolute must-have. Say goodbye to single-use alternatives and embrace the environmentally friendly choice. Get your pack today and make every celebration a memorable one with Tijar!

TIJAR Shot Glasses Merchant video Introducing the TIJAR Reusable Plastic Shot Glasses - the perfect addition to your party or event! Made from high-quality, durable plastic, these shot glasses are designed to withstand the test of time. Say goodbye to disposable shot glasses and hello to reusable alternatives. Each glass holds 30ml or 50ml of your favorite beverage, making them ideal for serving shots, mini cocktails, or even desserts. What are the sizes of the shot glasses? Our shot glasses come in two different sizes - 30ml and 50ml. The pack of 50 is a 30ml cup size and the other packs are 50ml cup size. What occasions are these plastic shot glasses suitable for? These versatile cups are perfect for parties, weddings, BBQs, catering, birthdays, picnics, and festive events. They’re also great for both indoor and outdoor use. Do the shot glasses have a strong, sturdy build? Yes, they are made from durable, crystal-clear plastic that is lightweight yet sturdy, ensuring a stylish and practical option for any occasion. What is the quantity of shot glasses? They are available in 4 different quantity packs - 50, 75, 100 and a box of 1000. Can these be used for desserts or appetisers as well? Versatility is key with the Tijar shot glasses. Not only are they perfect for your favorite spirits, but they can also be used for various other purposes. Serve up bite-sized appetizers, create stunning dessert displays, or use them for DIY crafts. Material Made from high-quality clear plastic that is durable, lightweight, and designed to provide a crystal-clear finish for an elegant look. Capacity Our Pack of 50 is 30ml (1 oz) and our Packs of 75, 100 and box of 1000 are 50ml (2 oz) Quantity Includes a pack of 50, 75, 100 or 1000 reusable shot glasses, ensuring you have enough for parties, events, and catering needs. Features Reusable, stackable, and easy to clean; suitable for indoor and outdoor use at weddings, BBQs, birthdays, and more.
